DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/a.description: Deletes an app and all its flags and changelog history. Returns 409 if any Worker still references this app via a Flagship binding.

409.description: Conflict — app is bound to Worker scripts.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/apps.description: Lists all apps in the account. Returns identity and audit fields only — flag definitions are not included.

updated_by.description: Email of the actor who last modified the app, or `unknown` when unavailable.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/apps.description: Returns an app's name and audit fields. Flag definitions are not included.

updated_by.description: Email of the actor who last modified the app, or `unknown` when unavailable.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/realtime/kit/.description: Fetch all apps for your account

parameters.description: The page number from which you want your page search results to be displayed.
parameters.name: page_no

parameters.description: Search string that matches apps by name.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Sort order for apps by creation time.
parameters.name: sort_order

GET /accounts/{account_id}/realtime/kit/.description: Fetch details for an app in your account.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/app.description: Creates an app. The returned `id` is used in all subsequent flag, changelog, and evaluation requests.

updated_by.description: Email of the actor who last modified the app, or `unknown` when unavailable.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/realtime/kit.description: Create new app for your account

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/flagship/apps.description: Updates an app. Only `name` is mutable.

updated_by.description: Email of the actor who last modified the app, or `unknown` when unavailable.
